title: Add predict_proba to KNeighborsClassifier and RadiusNeighborsClassifier
description:
sklearn KNeighborsClassifier and RadiusNeighborsClassifier both expose predict_proba(X) returning class probabilities derived from the (weighted) neighbor vote. ferrolearn currently only has predict (returns argmax labels).

Implementation: same neighbor-search path as predict, but normalize per-class weighted vote sums to sum to 1 per row. RadiusNeighborsClassifier needs to handle the 'no neighbors in radius' case (return uniform or NaN per sklearn's outlier_label policy).
